subcodes.first_line: O maidservant of God, thou who hast given up thy life to the service of the Kingdom of God! I have read the signs of thy thankfulness to God
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله التی وقفت حیاتها لخدمه ملکوت الله انی تلوت ایات شکرک لله بما هداک
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @role and station of women, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
